# CodLinex

> CodLinex is a US-focused AI automation agency that builds custom AI agent systems for small and mid-size businesses. We automate operations, save clients 20+ hours per week, and optimize their digital presence for AI search engines (GEO — Generative Engine Optimization).

> CodLinex, küçük ve orta ölçekli işletmeler için özel AI otomasyon sistemleri kuran bir yapay zeka ajansıdır. İş süreçlerini otomatize eder, haftada 20+ saat tasarruf sağlar ve GEO optimizasyonu ile işletmenizi AI arama motorlarında görünür kılarız.

---

## Services / Hizmetler

- [AI Agent Systems](https://codlinex.com/ai-agent) — Custom multi-agent automation: customer support (91% auto-resolution), lead follow-up, scheduling, reporting. Live in 48 hours guaranteed.
- [GEO Services](https://codlinex.com/geo-services) — Appear in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini. Four-phase methodology based on Princeton KDD 2024 research (doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900) — up to 40% visibility boost. Proven on our own domain: GEO score 19 → 90.
- [Business Automation](https://codlinex.com) — End-to-end workflow automation: support ticketing, lead nurturing, appointment reminders, inventory alerts, daily reporting.
- [Free AI Visibility Audit](https://codlinex.com/audit) — 5-minute GEO score for any website.

## Guides / Rehberler

- [Best AI Automation Agency for Small Business (2026)](https://codlinex.com/blog/best-ai-automation-agency-small-business) — Agency vs platform comparison, pricing benchmarks, 7 selection criteria.
- [GEO / AEO: Why It Matters Now](https://codlinex.com/blog/geo-aeo-guide) — How AI engines select content and how businesses become citable sources.

---

## Pricing / Fiyatlandırma

| Plan | Price / Fiyat | Agents | Actions/mo | Setup |
|------|---------------|--------|------------|-------|
| Starter | $497/mo | 1 | 1,000 | 48h |
| Growth | $997/mo | 3 | 5,000 | 48h |
| Enterprise | $2,497/mo | Unlimited | Unlimited | 48h |

All plans: 30-day money-back guarantee · No contracts · No technical knowledge required
Tüm planlar: 30 gün iade garantisi · Sözleşme yok · Teknik bilgi gerekmez

---

## Key Results / Kanıtlanmış Sonuçlar

- **91%** average customer support auto-resolution rate / Ortalama otomatik yanıt oranı
- **73%** reduction in appointment no-shows (healthcare clients) / Randevu iptali azalması
- **23+ hours** saved per week per client / Müşteri başına haftalık tasarruf
- **340%** pipeline growth (B2B SaaS client, 6-month campaign) / Pipeline büyümesi
- **48 hours** guaranteed go-live / Garantili yayına alma süresi
- **GEO score 19 → 79** improvement for codlinex.com in 2 days / GEO skor artışı

---

## Who We Help / Hedef Kitle

**US businesses with 5–100 employees / 5–100 çalışanlı ABD işletmeleri:**

- E-commerce: Shopify, WooCommerce automation — order alerts, customer support, review requests
- Healthcare clinics: appointment reminders, no-show reduction, patient follow-up
- Real estate agencies: lead qualification, follow-up sequences, listing content automation
- Law firms: document processing, client communication, intake automation
- Marketing agencies: automated reporting, content scheduling, client dashboards

---

## Case Studies / Müşteri Sonuçları

**E-commerce (Shopify):** Deployed AI customer support agent — 91% auto-resolution, 60% ticket volume reduction in 30 days.

**Healthcare clinic:** Appointment reminder + rebooking agent — 73% no-show reduction, 4 hours admin time saved per day.

**B2B SaaS:** Lead follow-up + outreach automation — 340% pipeline growth over 6 months.

**Real estate agency:** Listing content + lead nurturing agent — 3x faster lead response time.

---

## Integrations / Entegrasyonlar

Shopify · WooCommerce · WhatsApp Business · Slack · Gmail · Outlook · Calendly · HubSpot · Salesforce · Stripe · Twilio · Zapier · Make (Integromat) · n8n · Notion · Airtable

---

## Technology / Teknoloji

AI Models: GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5 Pro (model-agnostic)
Architecture: Multi-agent system (Manager → Worker → Monitor)
Deployment: Cloud-native, no infrastructure needed from client
Security: SOC2-aligned, data encryption at rest and in transit

---

## GEO Research Foundation

CodLinex GEO methodology is based on peer-reviewed academic research:
- Aggarwal et al. (2024). "GEO: Generative Engine Optimization." Princeton University. KDD 2024. [doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900](https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900)
- Key finding: citation-optimized content receives up to 40% more AI search visibility
- CodLinex implements all 47 documented GEO optimization methods
